ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Maximum number of tokens in response
ast.target: 响应中的最大 token 数

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Controls randomness in responses(0.0 to 1.0). Lower values make responses more deterministic, while higher values get more creative.
ast.target: 控制响应的随机性（0.0 到 1.0）。数值越低响应越确定，数值越高越有创意。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Stream response content as they're generated
ast.target: 生成时流式输出响应内容

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Show numbers of tokens in responses
ast.target: 显示响应中的 token 数量

ast.name: message
ast.source: This chat contains mixed formatting (both headers and callouts).
ast.target: 此聊天包含混合格式（标题与标注框）。

ast.name: message
ast.source: No valid formatting found (headers or callouts).
ast.target: 未找到有效格式（标题或标注框）。

ast.name: message
ast.source: This chat uses header format, please disable "Use callouts for chat formatting" in settings to continue.
ast.target: 此聊天使用标题格式，请在设置中禁用“使用标注框进行聊天格式化”以继续。

ast.name: message
ast.source: This chat uses callout format, please enable "Use callouts for chat formatting" in settings to continue.
ast.target: 此聊天使用标注框格式，请在设置中启用“使用标注框进行聊天格式化”以继续。

ast.name: message
ast.source: Invalid chat format, messages should alternate user query and assistant response.
ast.target: 聊天格式无效，消息应交替为用户提问和助手回复。
